Ragi.notes: Rainfed crop; requires good drainage during tillering.

Maize.notes: Sensitive to waterlogging during early growth.

Paddy.notes: Needs standing water; monitor monsoon arrival carefully.

Wheat.notes: Rabi staple; requires 2-3 irrigations during crown root initiation.

Paddy.notes: Basmati varieties are highly sensitive to late-season heat.

Cotton.notes: Monitor for Pink Bollworm during flowering (Aug–Sep).
